title: AI Solution Expo
subtitle: Showcasing the next generation of AI-driven solutions and innovations.
description: The AI Solution Expo is an upcoming flagship event where students will present innovative AI models, research projects, and deep learning solutions to real-world problems. Participants will have the opportunity to interact with industry experts, attend hands-on workshops, and win exciting prizes.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Workshops on generative AI and ML
Prizes and certificates for top solutions
